audit_items.proof_trace: Every deallocation in pubsub.c that could trigger a dict/list free method (dictObjectDestructor, decrRefCountVoid, freePubsubPattern) is preceded by a matching incrRefCount(ptr), keeping the object alive throughout subsequent use; this is verified for pubsubUnsubscribeChannel (L179 incrRefCount before L181/L194 dictDeletes) and pubsubUnsubscribePattern (L229 incrRefCount before L232/L236 listDelNodes). Iteration-during-mutation is safe: pubsubUnsubscribeAllPatterns uses listNext which pre-captures iter->next before returning the current node (adlist.c L231-235), and pubsubUnsubscribeAllChannels uses dictGetSafeIterator. Each pubsubPattern struct enters server.pubsub_patterns exactly once and is removed exactly once via freePubsubPattern, preventing double-free.
